# TallyWhatsApp

> TallyWhatsApp is a Windows desktop app that adds a Send-on-WhatsApp button to TallyPrime sales, receipt and ledger vouchers. The connector runs entirely on the user's PC — no cloud relay, no third-party server, no subscription. ₹299 lifetime, three activations included.

## Product

- [Home](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/): product overview, pricing, FAQ
- [Buy](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/#pricing): Razorpay payment page, ₹299 one-time
- [Download](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/download): latest MSI installer from GitHub Releases
- [Thank You](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/thank-you/): post-purchase setup guide

## Blog

- [Complete TallyWhatsApp Setup Guide: From Install to Your First WhatsApp Invoice](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/tallywhatsapp-complete-setup-guide/): full end-to-end walkthrough with screenshots — install MSI, activate license, pair WhatsApp, verify TDL hooks, send first invoice, track in activity log
- [Tally TDL Tutorial: Add a Send-on-WhatsApp Button in 5 Minutes](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/tally-tdl-tutorial-send-whatsapp/): anatomy of a working TDL hook for TallyPrime, with the four pitfalls every author hits
- [How to Send Tally Invoices on WhatsApp Automatically](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/send-tally-invoices-whatsapp-automatically/): step-by-step delivery flow for sales invoices, receipts and ledger statements
- [Tally Automation: 6 Manual Tasks You Should Stop Doing Today](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/tally-automation-checklist/): checklist of the highest-leverage TallyPrime automations
- [WhatsApp Invoice Sharing: A GST-Compliant Guide for Indian SMBs](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/whatsapp-invoice-gst-guide/): what the GST rules actually require for invoice delivery, and the privacy angle most articles miss
- [Tally Customization on a Budget: TDL vs Add-Ons vs Cloud Tools](https://tallywhatsapp.variantstudio.in/blog/tally-customization-comparison/): when each path is the right answer

## Key technical claims

- Uses the official WhatsApp Multi-Device protocol (treated as a linked device, like WhatsApp Web)
- Runs as a Windows service (TallyWhatsAppConnector) plus a system tray dashboard
- Loopback-only HTTP API on 127.0.0.1, HMAC-signed with a per-install secret
- License files signed with Ed25519 and verified offline — no phone-home for activation
- Three TDL hooks ship in the MSI: sales_send.tdl, receipt_send.tdl, ledger_send.tdl
- All voucher data, customer phone numbers and PDFs stay on the user's PC

## Support

- Email: admin@variantstudio.in
- Stuck QR fix: open elevated PowerShell and run `Restart-Service TallyWhatsAppConnector`
